name: Alex T.
content: Been using Wave for 3 months now. Instantly delivered and fully undetected. Best executor out there right now.

name: GamerDude99
content: Got the Mystery Box and actually pulled a 30-day key! Super fast delivery to my email. Support team is also very responsive on Discord.

name: Sarah_Bx
content: Seliware is lightweight and exactly what I needed. Works great on lower end PCs without crashing.

name: NiteHawk
content: Cheapest reseller on the market period. The automated delivery system works flawlessly. 10/10.
